title: Set up Convex reactive backend in Next.js
summary: Install Convex, define schema and functions (queries, mutations, actions), connect the React client, and get real-time data sync working in Next.js.
declaration: I will set up Convex as a reactive backend for this Next.js project. Convex gives you a real-time database where queries auto-update in the client whenever data changes — no manual refetching. If you need Supabase, Prisma, or Drizzle instead, say so before I begin.
